sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49919" key="*)idogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἰδογενής</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n49919.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born on Ida</tr_>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:12:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.12.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
